issue_statement: The IDE Delivery column still has no single engine-owned payload and command for delivery state.
expected_outcome: SCE exposes one scene delivery payload and one scene command that returns it in JSON.
impact_scope: delivery projection, delivery column support, scene-scoped inspection
reproduction_steps: Attempt to render the Delivery column from current mixed evidence files
Observe that one canonical payload is missing
Observe that the adapter would need to reconstruct delivery state locally
forbidden_workarounds: Do not build a permanent adapter-owned delivery registry
Do not turn read-only delivery projection into write behavior in this spec
